message:
fix: gracefully handle missing wisps table in epic/blocked queries (GH#2271)

When the wisps table does not exist (pre-migration Dolt databases), queries
in GetEpicsEligibleForClosure, GetBlockedIssues, and computeBlockedIDs
would fail with table not found: wisps. Now uses the existing
isTableNotExistError() guard pattern to skip the wisps table gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
